app.routes package

Submodules

app.routes.events module

app.routes.events.create_event()[source]
app.routes.events.delete_event(event_id)[source]
app.routes.events.get_event(event_id)[source]

Get a single event. Unpublished events are only visible to their organizer or an admin.

app.routes.events.list_events()[source]

List published events with optional search and filtering.

app.routes.events.my_events()[source]

Return all events (including drafts) created by the authenticated organizer.

app.routes.events.update_event(event_id)[source]

app.routes.materials module

app.routes.materials.delete_material(event_id, material_id)[source]
app.routes.materials.download_material(event_id, material_id)[source]
app.routes.materials.list_materials(event_id)[source]
